view.title: Survey Ship {id}
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Are ye sure ye want to resend the welcome dispatch?
view.emailSentMessage: The welcome dispatch has been resent. Check yer crow's nest.

reverseDns.title: Reverse Navigation Chart (DNS) Settings
reverseDns.changeWarning: Changes to reverse navigation charts take up to an hour to show up.

ipmiLive.title: IPMI Ship's Coordinates
ipmiLive.description: Give live Ship's Coordinates to IPMI controller restricted to yer coordinates and limited to 24 hours of use.

order.title: Commission Ship
order.orderDedicatedServer: Commission Dedicated Ship of the Line
order.hostnameHelp: Use the ship name to identify the vessel. The named port does not need to be valid or registered. One period is required in the ship name. Other examples: database.local, web.ship or yer.name.
order.passwordRequirement: Note: Secret Countersign must contain at least 8 characters, one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, one number, a special character.
order.autoRenewNotice: The subscription will automatically weigh anchor again after every moon cycle at {cost} until ye cancel yer commission.
order.tosAcknowledgement: By checking this box, ye acknowledge that ye are purchasing a subscription product that automatically renews (As Per The Ship's Articles Outlined Above) and is billed to the Letter of Credit ye provide today. If ye wish to cancel yer auto-renewal, ye may access the captain's portal, select the active vessel and click the Stand Down link or send a message in a bottle to: billing{'@'}interserver.net or use another method outlined in the Ship's Articles and Conditions. By checking the box and clicking Issue My Orders below, ye also acknowledge ye have read, understand, and agree to our Ship's Articles and Conditions and Privacy Policy.
order.iAgreeToTerms: I have read the ship's articles above and I agree.
